# Synthetic help output representing a 5-level deep command tree.
#
# Purpose: verify that discover.py halts recursion at depth 3 (configurable
# via --max-depth, default 3). The CLI structure below implies paths up to
# depth 5 (e.g., "foo bar baz qux quux"), but discover.py must stop walking
# at depth 3 and emit a warning like:
#   "depth limit reached at ['bar', 'baz', 'qux'] — children not walked"
#
# Tree structure (depth-annotated):
#   foo                   (depth 0 — root)
#   foo bar               (depth 1 — group)
#   foo bar baz           (depth 2 — subgroup)
#   foo bar baz qux       (depth 3 — at limit, STOP here)
#   foo bar baz qux quux  (depth 4 — NEVER walked)

# ---- foo --help (depth 0) ----
FOO — A deeply nested synthetic CLI.

USAGE
  foo <command> [flags]

COMMANDS
  bar:    Bar command group (has subcommands)
  top:    A flat top-level command (no subcommands)

FLAGS
  --help      Show help for command
  --version   Show version

# ---- foo bar --help (depth 1) ----
Bar command group.

USAGE
  foo bar <command> [flags]

COMMANDS
  baz:    Baz subcommand group (has subcommands)
  flat:   A flat bar subcommand (no subcommands)

INHERITED FLAGS
  --help   Show help for command

# ---- foo bar baz --help (depth 2) ----
Baz subcommand group.

USAGE
  foo bar baz <command> [flags]

COMMANDS
  qux:    Qux sub-subcommand group (has subcommands — depth limit approaches)
  leaf:   A leaf command at depth 3 (no subcommands)

INHERITED FLAGS
  --help   Show help for command

# ---- foo bar baz qux --help (depth 3 — discover.py stops here) ----
Qux sub-subcommand group.

USAGE
  foo bar baz qux <command> [flags]

COMMANDS
  quux:   Quux (depth 4 — must NOT be walked by discover.py)
  also:   Also depth 4 — must NOT be walked

INHERITED FLAGS
  --help   Show help for command

# ---- foo bar baz qux quux --help (depth 4 — NEVER fetched) ----
# This page would only be reached if discover.py ignores the depth limit.
# Its presence here documents what WOULD be returned if fetched.
Quux — deepest level command.

USAGE
  foo bar baz qux quux [flags]

FLAGS
  --help   Show help for command
